---
title: "Fate of soil nitrogen under long-term bare fallow - supplementry"
author: "Trish Fraser and Tom Moore"
date: last-modified
output-file: "Analysis_Report.html"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 5
    toc-title: "Contents"
    theme: united
    highlight-style: tango
    page-layout: full
    max-width: 2000px
    fig-width: 8
    fig-height: 4
    code-tools: true
    code-fold: true
    code-overflow: scroll
    df-print: paged
    embed-resources: true
    css: css/aicc-tables.css
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| results: false

# CRAN mirror for non-interactive installs
options(repos = c(CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org"))

# Install and load packages
packages <- c(
  "tidyverse", "readxl", "here", "janitor",
  "lme4", "MuMIn", "performance",
  "RColorBrewer", "gridExtra", "colorspace"
)
installed <- rownames(installed.packages())
missing   <- setdiff(packages, installed)
if (length(missing) > 0) install.packages(missing, dependencies = TRUE)
for (p in packages) library(p, character.only = TRUE)

options(mc.cores = parallel::detectCores())
```

# Data summary

::: {.callout-note title="Wrangling & Summary" collapse="true"}
```{r}
#| label: wrangle-df

# Total soil C & N: read, clean names, standardise depth labels and factors
df <- read_excel(here("Analysis/Data/compiled_data_for_paper.xlsx"), sheet = "Total soil C & N")
orig_names_1 <- names(df)
df <- df %>% clean_names()
response_labels_1 <- setNames(orig_names_1, names(df))
response_labels_1["tn_g_kg_soil"] <- "Total soil N, kg/ha"

df <- df %>%
  mutate(depth = fct_recode(depth, "0-75" = "0-7.5 cm", "75-150" = "7.5-15 cm", "150-250" = "15-25 cm"))
cols <- c("trial", "year", "plot", "treatment", "rep", "depth")
df[, cols] <- lapply(df[, cols], as.factor)
if ("treat_ment" %in% names(df) && !"treatment" %in% names(df)) {
  df <- df %>% mutate(treatment = treat_ment) %>% dplyr::select(-treat_ment)
}
df %>% group_by(year, treatment, depth) %>% tally()
```

```{r}
#| label: wrangle-df2

# POM C & N: read (skip header), clean names, depth labels, factors; ensure "months" for modelling
df.2 <- read_excel(here("Analysis/Data/compiled_data_for_paper.xlsx"), sheet = "POM C & N", skip = 1)
orig_names_2 <- names(df.2)
df.2 <- df.2 %>% clean_names()
response_labels_2 <- setNames(orig_names_2, names(df.2))
df.2 <- df.2 %>% mutate(depth = fct_recode(depth, "0-75" = "0 - 7.5", "75-150" = "7.5 - 15", "150-250" = "15 - 25"))
cols <- c("plot", "depth", "treatment", "rep")
df.2[, cols] <- lapply(df.2[, cols], as.factor)
if (!"months" %in% names(df.2) && "date" %in% names(df.2)) {
  d <- tryCatch(as.Date(df.2$date), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(d) || all(is.na(d))) d <- as.numeric(df.2$date)
  df.2$months <- as.numeric(difftime(d, min(d, na.rm = TRUE), units = "days")) / (365.25 / 12)
}
df.2 %>% group_by(date, treatment, depth) %>% tally()
```

```{r}
#| label: wrangle-df4

# Microbial biomass C & N: read, clean names, depth labels, factors
df.4 <- read_excel(here("Analysis/Data/compiled_data_for_paper.xlsx"), sheet = "MB C & N")
orig_names_4 <- names(df.4)
df.4 <- df.4 %>% clean_names()
response_labels_4 <- setNames(orig_names_4, names(df.4))
df.4 <- df.4 %>% mutate(depth = fct_recode(depth, "0-75" = "0 - 7.5", "75-150" = "7.5 - 15", "150-250" = "15 - 25"))
cols <- c("plot", "depth", "treatment", "rep")
df.4[, cols] <- lapply(df.4[, cols], as.factor)
df.4 %>% group_by(date, treatment, depth) %>% tally()
```

```{r}
#| label: wrangle-df3

# Total cations & pH: read (skip 2 rows), clean names, depth labels, factors
df.3 <- read_excel(here("Analysis/Data/compiled_data_for_paper.xlsx"), sheet = "Total cations & pH", skip = 2)
orig_names_3 <- names(df.3)
df.3 <- df.3 %>% clean_names()
response_labels_3 <- setNames(orig_names_3, names(df.3))
df.3 <- df.3 %>% mutate(depth = fct_recode(depth, "0-75" = "0 - 7.5", "75-150" = "7.5 - 15", "150-250" = "15 - 25"))
cols <- c("plot", "depth", "treatment", "replicate")
df.3[, cols] <- lapply(df.3[, cols], as.factor)
df.3 %>% group_by(year, treatment, depth) %>% tally()
```
:::

```{r}
#| label: functions
#| results: false

source(here::here("Scripts", "r", "functions.R"))
```
## Analyses
### Total soil C, N and bulk density

```{r}
#| label: analysis-1-fit
#| results: false

analysis_1 <- fit_models(
  df,
  response_vars = c("tn_g_kg_soil", "tc_g_kg_soil", "c_n_ratio", "bd_g_cm3", "c_stock_t_ha", "c_stock_to_25_cm_t_ha"),
  time = "months",
  treatment = "treatment",
  depth = "depth"
)
```

**Plots**

```{r}
#| label: analysis-1-plots
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 15
#| out-width: 25%

plot_model_fits(
  model_fits      = analysis_1,
  time            = "months",
  treatment       = "treatment",
  depth           = "depth",
  depth_order     = c("0-75", "75-150", "150-250"),
  raw_data        = df,
  response_labels = response_labels_1,
  ncol            = 2,
  save_dir        = here::here("Plots"),
  save_dpi        = 600,
  save_width      = 5,
  save_height     = 5
)
```

**AICc table**

::: {.aicc-table}
```{r}
#| label: analysis-1-aicc

knitr::kable(analysis_1$aicc_table)
```
:::

::: {.callout-note title="Model checks (click to show/hide)" collapse="true"}
```{r}
#| label: analysis-1-checks
#| eval: true
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 8
#| out-width: 100%

check_model_performance(analysis_1)
```
:::

::: {.callout-note title="Best model summaries (click to show/hide)" collapse="true"}
::: {.model-summary}
```{r}
#| label: analysis-1-summaries
#| class-output: model-summary

best_model_summaries(analysis_1)
```
:::
:::

### Particulate organic matter (POM) C and N

```{r}
#| label: analysis-2-fit
#| results: false

analysis_2 <- fit_models(
  df.2,
  response_vars = c("soil_mass_0_25_cm_t_ha", "total_pom_c_mg_ha", "total_pom_n_kg_ha"),
  time = "months",
  treatment = "treatment",
  depth = "depth"
)
```

**Plots**

```{r}
#| label: analysis-2-plots
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 10
#| out-width: 25%

plot_model_fits(
  model_fits      = analysis_2,
  time            = "months",
  treatment       = "treatment",
  depth           = "depth",
  depth_order     = c("0-75", "75-150", "150-250"),
  raw_data        = df.2,
  response_labels = response_labels_2,
  ncol            = 2,
  save_dir        = here::here("Plots"),
  save_dpi        = 600,
  save_width      = 5,
  save_height     = 5
)
```

**AICc table**

::: {.aicc-table}
```{r}
#| label: analysis-2-aicc

knitr::kable(analysis_2$aicc_table)
```
:::

::: {.callout-note title="Model checks (click to show/hide)" collapse="true"}
```{r}
#| label: analysis-2-checks
#| eval: true
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 8
#| out-width: 100%

check_model_performance(analysis_2)
```
:::

::: {.callout-note title="Best model summaries (click to show/hide)" collapse="true"}
::: {.model-summary}
```{r}
#| label: analysis-2-summaries
#| class-output: model-summary

best_model_summaries(analysis_2)
```
:::
:::

### Microbial biomass C and N

```{r}
#| label: analysis-3-fit
#| results: false

analysis_3 <- fit_models(
  df.4,
  response_vars = c("mbc_mg_kg", "mbn_mg_kg", "mbc_kg_ha", "mbc_0_25_cm_kg_ha", "mbn_kg_ha", "mbn_0_25_cm_kg_ha"),
  time = "months",
  treatment = "treatment",
  depth = "depth"
)
```

**Plots**

```{r}
#| label: analysis-3-plots
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 15
#| out-width: 25%

plot_model_fits(
  model_fits      = analysis_3,
  time            = "months",
  treatment       = "treatment",
  depth           = "depth",
  depth_order     = c("0-75", "75-150", "150-250"),
  raw_data        = df.4,
  response_labels = response_labels_4,
  ncol            = 2,
  save_dir        = here::here("Plots"),
  save_dpi        = 600,
  save_width      = 5,
  save_height     = 5
)
```

**AICc table**

::: {.aicc-table}
```{r}
#| label: analysis-3-aicc

knitr::kable(analysis_3$aicc_table)
```
:::

::: {.callout-note title="Model checks (click to show/hide)" collapse="true"}
```{r}
#| label: analysis-3-checks
#| eval: true
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 8
#| out-width: 100%

check_model_performance(analysis_3)
```
:::

::: {.callout-note title="Best model summaries (click to show/hide)" collapse="true"}
::: {.model-summary}
```{r}
#| label: analysis-3-summaries
#| class-output: model-summary

best_model_summaries(analysis_3)
```
:::
:::

### Soil pH and cations

```{r}
#| label: analysis-4-fit
#| results: false

analysis_4 <- fit_models(
  df.3,
  response_vars = c("p_h", "cations_0_25_cm_keq_ha", "ca_0_25_cm_keq_ha"),
  time = "months",
  treatment = "treatment",
  depth = "depth"
)
```

**Plots**

```{r}
#| label: analysis-4-plots
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 10
#| out-width: 25%

plot_model_fits(
  model_fits      = analysis_4,
  time            = "months",
  treatment       = "treatment",
  depth           = "depth",
  depth_order     = c("0-75", "75-150", "150-250"),
  raw_data        = df.3,
  response_labels = response_labels_3,
  ncol            = 2,
  save_dir        = here::here("Plots"),
  save_dpi        = 600,
  save_width      = 5,
  save_height     = 5
)
```

**AICc table**

::: {.aicc-table}
```{r}
#| label: analysis-4-aicc

knitr::kable(analysis_4$aicc_table)
```
:::

::: {.callout-note title="Model checks (click to show/hide)" collapse="true"}
```{r}
#| label: analysis-4-checks
#| eval: true
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 8
#| out-width: 100%

check_model_performance(analysis_4)
```
:::

::: {.callout-note title="Best model summaries (click to show/hide)" collapse="true"}
::: {.model-summary}
```{r}
#| label: analysis-4-summaries
#| class-output: model-summary

best_model_summaries(analysis_4)
```
:::
:::

# References

R Core Team (2022). R: A language and environment for statistical computing. R Foundation for Statistical Computing, Vienna, Austria.

::: {.callout-note title="Session Information" collapse="true"}
```{r}
#| label: session-info
#| echo: false

utils::sessionInfo()
```
:::
